transcript.content: I need to file a car insurance claim. My policy is POL9982.
Sure, I can help with that. What happened and when did it occur?
It happened yesterday, June 13th, 2026. A delivery van backed into my parked car. The damage is pretty bad on the bumper. Probably around $1,500 to fix.
Were there any other parties involved?
Yes, the delivery driver. His name is Dave Miller. No other cars were involved.
Our basement flooded. The pipe burst. Policy number is POL4004.
Oh, that's stressful. What date did the leak start, and how bad is the damage?
It happened on June 10th. The whole floor is ruined, including our home theater and computer setup. I'd say the loss is easily $35,000. It's just me and my husband here.
I'm sorry to hear that. Was there anyone else involved, or was it just natural wear?
Just a burst copper pipe. Plumber says it froze. No one else was involved.
